eval_dataset: tiled val split (604 source images, ~2881 tiles, same tiling as training)
eval_note: Evaluated on YOLO tiled val split. Full-image COCO test not directly comparable due to GT OBBs spanning full image height (h=4096) vs tiled predictions.

per_band.note: Per-band breakdown not available from YOLO val split (no COCO morphology bins)

phase8_targets.status: not_met — targets require Co-DINO Swin-L on full resolution
